backtest.note: No records provided. Real backtesting requires historical market odds captured before each match (not yet available).

disclaimers.purpose: Blended probabilities are for calibration benchmarking only. This is not financial or betting advice.
disclaimers.weights_not_tuned: Default weights (market 80% / model 20%) reflect a prior on market information content and have not been calibrated to any specific objective.
disclaimers.no_historical_market_data: No historical market odds available for 2014/2018/2022 WC. Backtesting the blend requires real pre-match market odds. Will be revisited once WC 2026 match data accumulates.
disclaimers.group_draw: Predictions use the placeholder group draw — NOT the official WC 2026 draw.
